author: Susan "Lady D" Damon
release_boundary: Line-edited review batch. This is not final KDP upload approval.

source_files.library_source: /Users/IDC2.5/Documents/LADY D/Production Library/01 Surrendering to God's Love/05 Review Packets/Author Voice Line Edit/Leap Day and Days 060-066/Leap Day and Days 060-066 Manuscript.md

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Grace for the Extra Day into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Receive this extra day as grace, and let the Father meet one heavy responsibility by name.
edits.reason: Keeps the leap-day gift and being-known-by-name theme concrete without turning the extra day into pressure.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Surrender to Love That Finds You into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Ask for the Father's way before the timetable changes; love can teach your feet in struggle.
edits.reason: Turns the Moses guidance prayer into a practical timing-and-way surrender.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Let Mercy Speak Grace Before Striving into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Let presence, not appearance, mark one pressure point today; grace goes with you before performance speaks.
edits.reason: Preserves presence before performance as covenant identity rather than image management.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Breathe Mercy in the Morning into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Begin before the noise by breathing mercy: the Father knows your name here.
edits.reason: Keeps the morning mercy practice personal, named, and easy to carry into the day.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Hold Fast to the Father's Patience into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Make one ordinary place a meeting place today, and seek the Father before reaction takes over.
edits.reason: Connects the tent-of-meeting lens to an ordinary, repeatable seeking practice.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Return to Love Stronger Than Fear into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Offer one fear-managed possession back to God; redeemed life does not have to clutch itself.
edits.reason: Keeps ancient redemption context careful while making redeemed belonging concrete.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Yield to Restoring Compassion into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Return while the door is still tender; compassion is calling you close enough to listen.
edits.reason: Keeps restoring compassion as a call back before distance becomes normal.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Anchor the Promise That Holds into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Rest this Saturday in the character God revealed; His compassion and truth can hold the struggle.
edits.reason: Preserves the seventh-day Sabbath guardrail while anchoring rest in God's revealed character.

judge_auditor_loops.evidence: All 8 impact lines now vary by entry theme and avoid the repeated `Let the Father's love carry` frame.
Sabbath remains seventh-day/Saturday; commandment-keeping and obedience stay framed as response to grace.
The batch file now has zero old Volume 1 morning-impact templates.
Repo source, public mirror, and Production Library manuscript receive the same edited text.

next_loop: Continue author-voice line edits in seven-day or month-close batches, then regenerate masters/interiors and update the review site after each meaningful gate.
